title: festuca ovina subsp. calligera
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. calligera, also known as Calligera sheep's fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. calligera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Festuca ovina subsp. calligera have been made into infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
